About

I am a dedicated front-end development specialist with a focus on static site architecture and infrastructure automation. My work bridges the gap between clean, high-performance documentation and complex back-end virtualization systems.

Based in Nairobi, I specialize in crafting platforms using Astro JS and MkDocs, while maintaining a robust home lab environment centered around Proxmox and Incus containers. I believe in high-contrast, functional design and efficient, automated workflows.
